payload.topic: Here is my rough draft: 'The city planted more trees and solved heat risk.' Give me feedback on whether my evidence use matches the source.
payload.summary:
As we established earlier, instead of copying from the source, I can help with an outline you can turn into your own answer.

Your evidence use does not fully match the source. The source indicates that tree canopy coverage increased, which suggests improvements but does not claim these changes alone solved all local heat risks. You might consider mentioning both points: increased tree planting an

encryption.note: Encryption at rest is not yet implemented in this service revision. This record is plaintext but remains locally stored and inspectable.
